ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_title" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "awardees" TEXT /* List of awardees */,
  "cid" TEXT /* Project identifier (CID) */,
  "subprogram_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subprogram the project belongs to */,
  "subprogram_node" TEXT /* Node identifier for the subprogram */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., Funding Opportunity, Lab Award) */,
  "foa_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding opportunity announcement (FOA) */,
  "foa_acronym" TEXT /* Acronym of the FOA */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Active, Completed) */,
  "award_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the award */,
  "award_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the award */,
  "total_government_share" TEXT /* Total government share of the project cost */,
  "cost_share" TEXT /* Cost share by the awardee */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the project is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the project is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the project location */,
  "node" TEXT /* Node identifier for the project */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the project location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the project location */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "project_budget" TEXT /* Total budget for the project, including both government and cost-sharing */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of renewable energy project (e.g., Solar, Wind, Hydro, Geothermal) */,
  "funding_status" TEXT /* Current funding status (e.g., Approved, Pending, Rejected) */,
  "final_report_url" TEXT /* URL to the final report of the project */,
  "project_outcomes" TEXT /* Summary of the project outcomes and impacts */,
  "project_phases" TEXT /* Phases of the project (e.g., Planning, Execution, Closure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_principal_investigator FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator") REFERENCES principal_investigators ("pi_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_awardees FOREIGN KEY ("awardees") REFERENCES awardees ("awardee_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_subprogram_id FOREIGN KEY ("subprogram_id") REFERENCES subprograms ("subprogram_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_foa_name FOREIGN KEY ("foa_name") REFERENCES funding_opportunities ("foa_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "subprograms" (
  "subprogram_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subprogram */,
  "subprogram_name" TEXT /* Name of the subprogram */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subprogram */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subprogram */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subprogram */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Total budget allocated to the subprogram */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the subprogram */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person for the subprogram */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subprogram_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_opportunities" (
  "foa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FOA */,
  "foa_name" TEXT /* Name of the FOA */,
  "foa_acronym" TEXT /* Acronym of the FOA */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the FOA */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the funding opportunity */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the funding opportunity */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Total budget for the funding opportunity */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the funding opportunity */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person for the funding opportunity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("foa_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awardees" (
  "awardee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each awardee */,
  "awardee_name" TEXT /* Name of the awardee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the awardee */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the awardee is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the awardee is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the awardee */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the awardee */,
  "organization_type" TEXT /* Type of organization (e.g., University, Private Company, Government) */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the awardee's website */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year in which the awardee received funding */,
  "total_funding_received" TEXT /* Total funding received by the awardee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("awardee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "principal_investigators" (
  "pi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each principal investigator */,
  "pi_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the principal investigator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the principal investigator */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the principal investigator */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the principal investigator within the organization */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Field of expertise of the principal investigator */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the principal investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_deliverables" (
  "deliverable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deliverable */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the deliverable is associated with */,
  "deliverable_name" TEXT /* Name of the deliverable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the deliverable */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the deliverable */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Completion date of the deliverable */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the deliverable (e.g., Pending, Completed) */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the deliverable approval (e.g., Approved, Rejected, Pending) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the deliverable was approved */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback on the deliverable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deliverable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_deliverables_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the milestone is associated with */,
  "milestone_name" TEXT /* Name of the milestone */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the milestone */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the milestone */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Completion date of the milestone */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the milestone (e.g., Pending, Completed) */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the milestone approval (e.g., Approved, Rejected, Pending) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the milestone was approved */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback on the milestone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_milestones_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Project Manager, Awardee, Public) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., Government, University, Public) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., Active, Inactive, Suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_affiliation FOREIGN KEY ("affiliation") REFERENCES awardees ("awardee_name")
)
